data.title: Encryption
data.description: Employs robust encryption protocols to secure user data in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.2 or higher for data in transit, AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Identity and Access Management (IAM)
data.description: Strict IAM policies to limit access to sensitive data and services.
data.technical_spec: Role-based access controls with least privilege principle.

data.title: Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) Protection
data.technical_spec: AWS Shield and additional third-party solutions.

data.title: Security Monitoring and Incident Response
data.description: Continuous security monitoring and well-defined incident response plan.
data.technical_spec: SIEM systems and dedicated security operations center (SOC).

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Regular vulnerability assessments and penetration testing.
data.technical_spec: Automated scans and manual testing using advanced tools.
